name: Little Slippey
short_description: Dodge tons of missiles flying at you. Practice your reactions, memorize the structure of the maps and adapt to the ever-changing rules on them.
detailed_description:
Dodge tons of missiles flying at you. Practice your reactions, memorize the structure of the maps and adapt to the ever-changing rules on them.

Game Features:

  • 10 unique levels, which in addition to a unique mood and visuals may have “fun” features. A deadly circular saw attached to another saw that's attached to an even bigger saw? We have that. Or a level that forces you to jump on flying cars, from one to another, and pray that you don't fall to the bottom from a height of more than 200 meters above the ground? And how about a l̻̅evel̨̒ w͗itȟ̹ ̅c̥͛ǘȓ̘s̑e͒ď͚ ͇͠b̢̺̥̌͜ľ̤̟̰͜a̱͗̌̓c͔̲̺̰̏͑k̖̳̪̐ͅ ̮̈́͋͝h͎͉̙̦̎o̥̓̓l̨͎͖͐͘̕ͅe̹̥̾s̯̤͇͊ ̖͚͓̰̀̉ẗ̸́̽͠ḩ̸̨̜̗̲͙̅̒̏͝ǎ̶̓͋3̶̫̹̻͉̉̈^̷͔̲̲̺͂̌͘͠͝$̸͍̏͐)̴̡̝̤̣̅̊

  • 5 types of crosses (missiles), extremely different from each other and requiring a unique approach. Will you be able to survive in a hell where all of them are mixed on one screen and won't stop appearing? It depends only on your persistence!

  • Lots of different skins that add beautiful effects on top of the new look. Unlock new skins for completing levels and more!

Pass levels, break records, and don't look for a story in the game. There is no story.
